positive: Minimalist celestial journey, featuring a stylized, crescent moon passing through a field of bioluminescent deep-sea flora. The design utilizes clean, bold silhouettes of mythical, floating jellyfish and exotic constellations forming an ethereal pathway. Strong contrast between deep indigo midnight blues and vibrant neon teal accents, highlighted by shimmering gold foil accents. Highly graphic, vector-art aesthetic, centered composition, perfect for screen printing on apparel, UHD, smooth gradient transitions, high symmetry, flat lay style.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logos, signatures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, grain, noise, photorealism, messy, cluttered, grayscale, poor composition
